name: No witnesses to my chem spill at work in Boise, can I still get comp?
description: Yes, medicals and job records prove it without witnesses.

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my chem spill at work in Boise, can I still get comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medicals and job records prove it without witnesses.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, medical records, your testimony, and circumstantial evidence like safety logs suffice.** Idaho accepts solo claims if exposure is probable from job duties.[6] Key factors: consistent medical history, MSDS confirming hazards, employer admissions. Reconstruct via emails/shifts; doctor reports carry weight. Lawyers prove cases without witnesses routinely.
